verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` in the project root. The build must succeed with no errors.
environment_constraints: No test framework in this project. Verification is build-only.
key_patterns: State is managed via React useState hooks in App.jsx. Data is persisted to localStorage under 'nexus-app-state'. Task-card linking uses a separate `cardTaskLinks` array of {cardId, taskId} objects. TaskPanel receives props from App.jsx. Node context menu in App.jsx allows 'Add to Tasks' action.
directory_structure: src/ contains all source: App.jsx (main component, 5900+ lines), TaskPanel.jsx, PinPanel.jsx, ReminderPanel.jsx, MiniMap.jsx, main.jsx, index.css
